label: weather_ward8_2022_api
description: Hourly weather for the Ward 8 service-request centroid, 2022 analysis window. start_date is 2021-12-01 (31-day buffer) so the full 15-day lookback window is available for early January 2022.
latitude_source: mean LATITUDE of 2022 311 rows in this ward
longitude_source: mean LONGITUDE of 2022 311 rows in this ward
notes: latitude and longitude are computed at runtime and recorded in weather_cache/<label>_metadata.json alongside cached weather rows.
